0.003.label: Design spec (RIN-limited)
0.003.physical: RIN = -150 dB/Hz, WDM isolation 30dB, PLL BW ≥ 500kHz

0.03.label: Design spec boundary
0.03.physical: ρ_RIN + ρ_WDM combined; upper bound of spec

0.08.label: GNN crossover (d=3)
0.08.physical: Multiple degraded subsystems; ~500Hz PLL BW or RIN=-130dB/Hz

0.1.label: Significant correlation
0.1.physical: Pump RIN=-125dB/Hz or shared thermal drift >0.5°

0.15.label: High correlation
0.15.physical: Multi-pump RIN or broadband thermal instability

0.2.label: FT boundary
0.2.physical: System-level failure; FT collapse per Exp-A4b
